title: Penalties for noncompliance
doc_html:
§1517. Penalties for noncompliance

            If any agency fails to comply with the provisions of this Chapter, the agency's funding may be withheld until compliance is achieved, subject to applicable laws and procedures.

            Acts 2025, No. 419, §1, eff. June 20, 2025.
doc_text:
§1517. Penalties for noncompliance
If any agency fails to comply with the provisions of this Chapter, the agency's funding
may be withheld until compliance is achieved, subject to applicable laws and procedures.
Acts 2025, No. 419, §1, eff. June 20, 2025.
